evalAfter: (async()=>{const w=ms=>new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));const b=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||''));if(b)b.click();await w(4000);if(!window.MembreteSystem)return{err:'no MS'};const of=window.fetch;window.__cap=null;window.fetch=function(u,o){try{const bs=o&&o.body?String(o.body):'';if(/crear-membrete/.test(bs)){window.__cap=JSON.parse(bs);return Promise.resolve(new Response(JSON.stringify({ok:true,data:{idLote:'TEST',total:(window.__cap.items||[]).length,status:'COMPLETADO'}}),{status:200,headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'}}));}}catch(e){}return of.apply(this,arguments);};MembreteSystem.abrirMenuProductoCard({codigoBarra:'7501234567890',descripcion:'GALLETA SODA DERIVADA 250 GR',precio:5.5,skuBase:'SKU-TEST',idProducto:'SKU-TEST',codigoProductoBase:'BASE-1',adhSugerido:12});await w(800);const wh=document.getElementById('msWhQty');if(wh)wh.value='2';const btns=[...document.querySelectorAll('#msMenuOverlay button')];const whBtn=btns.find(x=>/MEMBRETE_WH/.test(x.getAttribute('onclick')||''));if(!whBtn)return{err:'no whBtn'};whBtn.click();await w(1500);const cap=window.__cap;return{tipo:cap?cap.tipo:null,itemsLen:cap&&cap.items?cap.items.length:null,todosIguales:cap&&cap.items?cap.items.every(x=>x.codigoBarra===cap.items[0].codigoBarra):null};})()
